zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Douglas於1425年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾卡維斯 豪斯時，她的父親William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers30歲，母親Margaret Stewart25歲。她於1445年與Sir Andrew Kerr of Auldbounburn and Cessford在蘇格蘭洛包爾聖 波斯維爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1484年6月在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾斯福德享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Douglas于1425年出生在英国苏格兰洛包爾卡維斯 豪斯时，她的父亲William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers30岁，母亲Margaret Stewart25岁。她于1445年与Sir Andrew Kerr of Auldbounburn and Cessford在苏格兰洛包爾聖 波斯維爾斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1484年6月在英国苏格兰洛包爾斯福德享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Douglas was born in 1425, in Cavers House, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers, was 30 and her mother, Margaret Stewart, was 25. She married Sir Andrew Kerr of Auldbounburn and Cessford in 1445, in Saint Boswells, Roxburghshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in June 1484, in Cessford, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglasが1425年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアカバーズ ホーウゼで生まれた時，父William Douglas 2nd Lord of Caversは30歳，母Margaret Stewartは25歳であった。1445年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアサイント ボスウエルズでSir Andrew Kerr of Auldbounburn and Cessfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1484年6月にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアセスフォードで59歳で死去した。

ko.Newtown Saint Boswells, Scottish Borders: 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 뉴타운 세인트 보스웰스
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglas(이)가 1425년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 카버스 허스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Stewart(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1445년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 세인트 보스웰스에서 Sir Andrew Kerr of Auldbounburn and Cessford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1484년 6월 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 세스퍼드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Newtown Saint Boswells, Scottish Borders: нютоун сеинт босвеллс, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Douglas родилась в 1425 г. в местности кавирс хоус, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stewart, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Andrew Kerr of Auldbounburn and Cessford в 1445 г. в местности сеинт босвеллс, роксбургшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла июнь 1484 г. в местности кессфорд, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.
